name: CVE-2017-5487 - WordPress User Enumeration - GitHub
snippet: The CVE-2017-5487 vulnerability in WordPress 4.7 before 4.7.1 exposes websites to potential information disclosure attacks through the REST API.

name: WordPress REST API User Enumeration - Vulnerabilities - Acunetix
snippet: Description. WordPress versions prior to 4.7.1 expose a REST API endpoint that allows unauthenticated users to enumerate registered user accounts.

name: CVE-2023-5561: WordPress Information Disclosure Flaw
snippet: CVE-2023-5561 is an information disclosure vulnerability in WordPress that allows attackers to discover email addresses of users via REST API ...

name: CVE-2025-4302 Detail - NVD
snippet: The Stop User Enumeration WordPress plugin before version 1.7.3 blocks REST API /wp-json/wp/v2/users/ requests for non-authorized users.

name: Urgent Security Alert: Username Enumeration Vulnerability Found
snippet: This flaw allows attackers to discern valid usernames by analyzing different system responses during login, password reset, or registration processes.
